interface_types.name: InputInterface
interface_types.code: TYPE InputInterface IS INTERFACE AND Interfaces.InputInterface;

interface_types.name: InputOutputInterface
interface_types.code: TYPE InputOutputInterface IS INTERFACE AND Interfaces.InputOutputInterface;

interface_types.name: OutputInterface
interface_types.code: TYPE OutputInterface IS INTERFACE AND Interfaces.OutputInterface;

access_types.name: Input
access_types.code: TYPE Input IS ACCESS ALL InputInterface'Class;

access_types.name: InputOutput
access_types.code: TYPE InputOutput IS ACCESS ALL InputOutputInterface'Class;

access_types.name: Output
access_types.code: TYPE Output IS ACCESS ALL OutputInterface'Class;
